name: Rogi FluffBottom
description: Rogi FluffBottom is a reincarnation of himself who’s been blessed by the “Kitsune Gods” that gave him a chance at life once more. He’s been through hell and back, to war, and many journeys, making friends, and enemies. Though he is a god, he’s very softhearted and peaceful to a loving extent, even to those he just met. His softheartedness makes him only choose fighting if it came down to it, and very subjective to sweets, usually ending in his submission.
creator: RogiDehFoxxo
